headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Equinix (EQIX) After A 39.6% Year To Date Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Equinix at around US$1,066.76 is still a sensible entry point, or if the price already reflects most of the opportunity. The stock has seen a 1.5% decline over the last 7 days, a 5.9% return over the last 30 days, 39.6% year to date, and 26.8% over the last year, which can change how the market is thinking about both upside and risk. Recent coverage has focused on Equinix's role as a large data center real estate investment trust and its position in global digital...
